evals.prompt: Core Web Vitals are failing. Run a perf sweep.
evals.expected_output: Should route to speed-it. Should freeze journey list + budgets, baseline to a measurement contract, profile the bottleneck, fix PR-per-hotspot with mandatory before/after, re-benchmark, add CI regression guards, and loop until WITHIN-BUDGET or OPTIMIZED-WITH-PARKED.

evals.prompt: The app is slow on mobile.
evals.expected_output: Should route to speed-it. Should treat mobile performance as a journey with a pinned device/throttle measurement contract, not a single spot measurement.
assertions: Mentions mobile as a declared journey
Uses statistical contract, not one run

evals.prompt: Watch production performance after the next deploy.
evals.expected_output: Should NOT route to speed-it alone. Post-deploy observation is observe via ship-it; speed-it owns the pre-deploy budget-meet loop.
assertions: Does not route to speed-it as primary mission
Routes post-deploy watch to ship-it / observe
